ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the conference */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the conference */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the conference */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the conference */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for conference inquiries */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the conference website */,
  "registration_open_date" TEXT /* Date when conference registration opens */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when conference registration closes */,
  "early_bird_deadline" TEXT /* Date for early bird registration */,
  "total_attendees" INTEGER /* Total number of attendees registered for the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the session belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., colloquium, paper, custom) */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees allowed in the session */,
  "current_capacity" INTEGER /* Current number of registered attendees for the session */,
  "registration_open_date" TEXT /* Date when session registration opens */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when session registration closes */,
  "is_invited_only" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the session is invite-only */,
  "is_PUBLIC" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the session is public or private */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., planned, confirmed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES session_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the speaker */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the speaker (e.g., university, organization) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the speaker */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the speaker */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the speaker's photo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the speaker's personal or professional website */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Speaker's Twitter handle */,
  "linkedin_profile" TEXT /* Speaker's LinkedIn profile URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speaker_sessions" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the speaker in the session (e.g., presenter, chair, discussant) */,
  "presentation_title" TEXT /* Title of the speaker's presentation */,
  "presentation_abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the speaker's presentation */,
  "presentation_slides_url" TEXT /* URL of the presentation slides */,
  "is_keynote" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the session is a keynote session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id", "session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the attendee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the attendee */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the attendee (e.g., university, organization) */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of the attendee's registration (e.g., registered, pending, canceled) */,
  "is_student" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the attendee is a student */,
  "dietary_restrictions" TEXT /* Dietary restrictions of the attendee */,
  "accessibility_needs" TEXT /* Accessibility needs of the attendee */,
  "interests" TEXT /* List of topics or sessions the attendee is interested in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the attendee registered for the session */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the registration is confirmed */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the registration fee is paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword associated with the session */,
  "relevance_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the relevance of the keyword to the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the attendee (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the attendee */,
  "is_recommended" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the attendee recommends the session */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stakeholders" (
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stakeholder */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the stakeholder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the stakeholder */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the stakeholder record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the stakeholder record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stakeholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stakeholders_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the permission is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the session type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available at the location */,
  "map_url" TEXT /* URL to a map of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)
